user.title: Add a washing machine
user.description: Select the Home Assistant entities used to monitor this washing machine. Power, door, and vibration sensors are required.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this washing machine.
data_description.power_sensor: A sensor that reports the current active power in watts.
data_description.door_sensor: Required. Used to arm cycle detection and record door events.
data_description.vibration_sensor: Required. Used to detect a probable final spin.
data_description.leak_sensor: Optional. Monitored independently by the Leak Detector.
data_description.energy_sensor: Optional. Used to calculate energy consumed by a cycle.
data_description.plug_switch: Optional. Used only as a diagnostic source; Laundry Monitor does not control it.
data_description.track_laundry: Expose laundry-presence tracking and a Mark unloaded button.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure washing machine
reconfigure.description: Change the source entities or laundry-tracking setting.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this washing machine.
data_description.power_sensor: A sensor that reports the current active power in watts.
data_description.door_sensor: Required. Used to arm cycle detection and record door events.
data_description.vibration_sensor: Required. Used to detect a probable final spin.
data_description.leak_sensor: Optional. Monitored independently by the Leak Detector.
data_description.energy_sensor: Optional. Used to calculate energy consumed by a cycle.
data_description.plug_switch: Optional. Used only as a diagnostic source; Laundry Monitor does not control it.
data_description.track_laundry: Expose laundry-presence tracking and a Mark unloaded button.

error.already_configured: This power sensor is already used by another Laundry Monitor entry.

abort.already_configured: This power sensor is already used by another Laundry Monitor entry.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The washing machine was reconfigured successfully.

init.title: Detector thresholds
init.description: Configure power thresholds and confirmation periods for cycle start, final spin, and cycle completion.

data.spin_min_cycle_time: Minimum cycle time before final spin

data_description.activity_threshold: Power at or above this value counts as meaningful machine activity.
data_description.start_threshold: Power must remain at or above this value to confirm that a cycle has started.
data_description.start_confirmation: How long start-level power must remain present.
data_description.spin_required_events: Number of vibration OFF-to-ON events required to confirm a probable final spin.
data_description.spin_window: Rolling period in which the required vibration events must occur.
data_description.spin_min_cycle_time: Minimum elapsed cycle time before final-spin evidence can be accepted.
data_description.spin_activity_max_age: Maximum age of the last meaningful power activity that can support final-spin detection.
data_description.finish_confirmation: How long both meaningful activity and vibration must remain absent before the cycle is finished.

required_source_unavailable.title: Required laundry sensor unavailable
required_source_unavailable.description: Laundry Monitor cannot reliably monitor **{name}** because the required entity `{entity_id}` is missing, unknown, or unavailable. Restore the entity or reconfigure the integration.

error.activity_threshold_above_start: The activity threshold must not be higher than the start threshold.
